title: Embed Live365 player iframe in OnAirNow component

requirements.summary: Embed the Live365 iframe player inside the OnAirNow component with responsive layout and preserved country theme styling
acceptanceCriteria: The Live365 player iframe with src `https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3` is rendered inside `frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`.
The iframe is wrapped in a responsive container with a max-width cap (e.g. max-w-[450px]) and centered horizontally.
On mobile viewports the player does not overflow or cause horizontal scrolling.
The existing country theme styling (warm earthy tones, serif headings, ON AIR badge, show info) is preserved around the player.
The player is positioned prominently and visibly within the OnAirNow section.

file_operations.description: Add the Live365 player iframe below the show information within the OnAirNow component. Wrap the iframe in a responsive container div with classes like `mx-auto max-w-[450px] w-full mt-6` to center it and cap its width. Set the iframe to `w-full h-auto` with `aspect-[450/316]` to maintain its aspect ratio responsively. Position the player prominently after the show details and DJ name, preserving all existing country-themed styling including the animated ON AIR badge, serif headings, and warm color palette.
